title: Cassus Fett's Battle Armor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Armor |image=[[File:Cassusfett.jpg]] |name=Cassus Fett's Battle Armor |manufacturer= |model= |type=[[Armor/Legends|Battle armor]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |culture=[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] |creators= |created= |destroyed= |discovered= |owners=[[Cassus Fett]]
[[Adum Larp]] |locations= |cost=15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] |value= |structure= |size=Sufficient to fit a [[Human/Legends|human]] body |color=[[Color/Legends|Purple]] |material= |length= |width= |height= |weight= |protection= |capacity= |range= |inscription= |markings= |purpose=Battle armor |heritage= |affiliation=*[[Clan Fett]] }} '''Cassus Fett's Battle Armor''' was a personal suit of [[Mandalorian battle armor]] that had been designed for and worn by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior and tactician [[Cassus Fett]] prior to the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Fett presumably wore this armor at the [[Battle of Jaga's Cluster]], when he killed the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]—an action that earned him infamy across the galaxy. After his apparent death, his armor was then acquired by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] dealer and arms merchant [[Adum Larp]], who placed it for sale at 15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Zbroja bitewna Cassusa Fetta }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Fett, Cassus's Battle Armor}} [[Category:Heavy armor]] [[Category:Mandalorian armor]]
